name: Arcane Blink
description: A revitalizing tool to help bear the weight of arcane expenditure.

abilities.name: Arcane Blink
abilities.description: Instantly teleports the wielder towards the targeted point. Cooldown: 9. Mana Cost: 0. Cast Range: Global. Max Blink Distance: 1400. Heal: 250. After the teleportation, heals and replenishes the caster's health and mana.
